examples: For months, we shared daily heart-to-hearts and awkward kisses that tasted cider and spearmint.
As an expression of Moroccan hospitality and tradition, mint tea-a mix of green tea, spearmint leaves and sugar-is served during gatherings.
Gel or paste, wintergreen or spearmint: these work the same way, so pick the one you like.
The degustation menu changes daily, but look for the ceviche (often tinged with spearmint) and always save room for dessert.
